introSection: Dixie Flyer, originally known as Red Devil, was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Summit Beach Park in Akron, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: A 35-year-old woman fell out of the ride on May 16, 1924 and was dragged to her death.

fullText:
Dixie Flyer, originally known as Red Devil, was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Summit Beach Park in Akron, Ohio, USA.

A 35-year-old woman fell out of the ride on May 16, 1924 and was dragged to her death.
